## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if helpful.

## Environment

- **DTPF version / commit:** (e.g. `main` @ `abc1234`, or agent version from tray)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Node.js:** (e.g. 20.x)
- **Component:** (desktop agent / `@dtpf/sdk-core` / `@dtpf/sdk-react` / demo app)

## Additional context

- Is the desktop agent running? (`pnpm agent:dev`)
- Did you approve the web app in the registration dialog?
- Any relevant logs from the agent console or browser devtools.
